mapper.select:
SELECT s.name AS teacherName, DATE_FORMAT(l.date, '%Y-%m') AS month, c.name AS courseName, CAST(SUM(ls.dec_lesson_count) AS SIGNED) AS consumptionCount, IFNULL(c.salary, 0) * SUM(ls.dec_lesson_count) AS feeSubtotal FROM lesson_student ls LEFT JOIN lesson l ON l.id = ls.lesson_id LEFT JOIN staff s ON s.id = l.teacher_id LEFT JOIN course c ON c.id = ls.consume_course_id
l.teacher_id IS NOT NULL AND ls.consume_course_id IS NOT NULL AND l.state = 2 AND IFNULL(l.deleted, 0) = 0
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.name}, '%')
AND l.date >= DATE(#{condition.startTime})
AND l.date <= DATE(#{condition.endTime})
GROUP BY l.teacher_id, s.name, DATE_FORMAT(l.date, '%Y-%m'), ls.consume_course_id, c.name, c.salary HAVING SUM(ls.dec_lesson_count) > 0 ORDER BY month DESC, teacherName ASC, courseName ASC
